import click

@click.group()
@click.pass_context
def cli(ctx):
    # Correct: load config once in the parent group and pass via context
    with open("config.yaml") as f:
        ctx.obj = yaml.safe_load(f)

@cli.command()
@click.pass_obj
def sync(config):
    print(f"Syncing {config['endpoint']}")
